sections.instruction: Questions 1-3: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 4 and 5: Complete the flowchart below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 6-10: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

options: A Central America
B Hawaii
C Australia
A grew extremely large
B multiplied in number
C ate the cane beetles
A there were too many beetles
B their own research was faulty
C they believed the reports they read
A thrives today
B has died out in some areas
C survives alongside the beetle

questions.content: The second lesson to be learned from this story is that
options: A the environment is constantly at risk
B first hand research is not always necessary
C caution is necessary when dealing with nature

sections.instruction: Complete the time table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

Questions 21-25: What opinion is expressed about each dissertation? Choose your answers from the list below and write the letters A-I next to questions 21-25. Questions 26-30: Complete the flow chart below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content:
(21) Twentieth Century Architecture
(22) Modern Construction
(23) Steel, Glass and Concrete
(24) The Space We Make
(25) Change and Tradition
options: A it has an inadequate index
B it contains unusual illustrations
C it is too detailed in places
D it presents clear arguments
E it contains diagrams which are not clear
F it omits important historical facts
G it is poorly translated
H it contains useful background information
I it is not suitable for new students

sections.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
